# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION: "30 days"
  BUILD_DIR: "build"
  CONFIG_DIR: "config"

build_application:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache gcc musl-dev make
  script:
    - echo "Building application binaries..."
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}
    - mkdir -p ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - echo "Building main binary..."
    - echo '#!/bin/sh' > ${BUILD_DIR}/app
    - echo 'echo "Application v1.0.0 running..."' >> ${BUILD_DIR}/app
    - chmod +x ${BUILD_DIR}/app
    - echo "Building worker binary..."
    - echo '#!/bin/sh' > ${BUILD_DIR}/worker
    - echo 'echo "Worker process running..."' >> ${BUILD_DIR}/worker
    - chmod +x ${BUILD_DIR}/worker
    - echo "Generating configuration files..."
    - echo "APP_NAME=MyApplication" > ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - echo "VERSION=1.0.0" >> ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - echo "PORT=8080" >> ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - echo "LOG_LEVEL=info" > ${CONFIG_DIR}/logging.conf
    - echo "MAX_CONNECTIONS=100" >> ${CONFIG_DIR}/logging.conf
    - echo "Build completed successfully"
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/
    - ls -la ${CONFIG_DIR}/
  artifacts:
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success
  tags:
    - docker

build_documentation:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Building documentation..."
    - mkdir -p docs/html
    - echo "<html><body><h1>Application Documentation</h1></body></html>" > docs/html/index.html
    - echo "# Installation Guide" > docs/INSTALL.md
    - echo "# User Manual" > docs/USER_GUIDE.md
  artifacts:
    name: "documentation-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - docs/
    expire_in: 30 days
  tags:
    - docker

test_unit:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  script:
    - echo "Running unit tests..."
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/
    - echo "Testing app binary..."
    - test -f ${BUILD_DIR}/app && echo "app binary exists" || exit 1
    - test -x ${BUILD_DIR}/app && echo "app binary is executable" || exit 1
    - echo "Testing worker binary..."
    - test -f ${BUILD_DIR}/worker && echo "worker binary exists" || exit 1
    - test -x ${BUILD_DIR}/worker && echo "worker binary is executable" || exit 1
    - echo "Testing configuration files..."
    - test -f ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf && echo "app.conf exists" || exit 1
    - test -f ${CONFIG_DIR}/logging.conf && echo "logging.conf exists" || exit 1
    - grep -q "VERSION=1.0.0" ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf && echo "Version check passed" || exit 1
    - echo "All unit tests passed"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      junit: test-results.xml
    when: always
  tags:
    - docker

test_integration:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  script:
    - echo "Running integration tests..."
    - echo "Testing application startup..."
    - ${BUILD_DIR}/app > app_output.log 2>&1 || true
    - cat app_output.log
    - grep -q "Application.*running" app_output.log && echo "App integration test passed" || exit 1
    - echo "Testing worker startup..."
    - ${BUILD_DIR}/worker > worker_output.log 2>&1 || true
    - cat worker_output.log
    - grep -q "Worker.*running" worker_output.log && echo "Worker integration test passed" || exit 1
    - echo "All integration tests passed"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - "*.log"
    expire_in: 7 days
    when: always
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - test_unit
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache rsync openssh-client
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/
    - ls -la ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    - echo "Creating deployment directory..."
    - mkdir -p /tmp/staging_deploy
    - echo "Copying binaries..."
    - cp -r ${BUILD_DIR}/* /tmp/staging_deploy/
    - echo "Copying configurations..."
    - cp -r ${CONFIG_DIR}/* /tmp/staging_deploy/
    - echo "Executing deployment script..."
    - cd /tmp/staging_deploy
    - ./app &
    - sleep 2
    - echo "Verifying deployment..."
    - ps aux | grep -v grep | grep app && echo "Application deployed successfully" || echo "Warning: Application not running"
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed"
  artifacts:
    name: "staging-deployment-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - develop
    - main
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - test_unit
    - test_integration
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache rsync openssh-client
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - echo "Creating backup of current deployment..."
    - mkdir -p /tmp/backup
    - echo "Preparing production deployment directory..."
    - mkdir -p /tmp/production_deploy
    - echo "Copying artifacts to production..."
    - cp -r ${BUILD_DIR}/* /tmp/production_deploy/
    - cp -r ${CONFIG_DIR}/* /tmp/production_deploy/
    - echo "Setting up production configuration..."
    - cd /tmp/production_deploy
    - sed -i 's/LOG_LEVEL=info/LOG_LEVEL=warning/' logging.conf 2>/dev/null || true
    - echo "Executing production deployment..."
    - ./app &
    - sleep 2
    - echo "Running health checks..."
    - ps aux | grep -v grep | grep app && echo "Health check passed" || exit 1
    - echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
  artifacts:
    name: "production-deployment-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - main
  when: manual
  tags:
    - docker

archive_artifacts:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - build_documentation
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache tar gzip
    - echo "Creating release archive..."
    - tar -czf release-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz ${BUILD_DIR}/ ${CONFIG_DIR}/ docs/
    - echo "Archive created successfully"
    - ls -lh release-*.tar.gz
  artifacts:
    name: "release-archive-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - release-*.tar.gz
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - tags
    - main
  tags:
    - docker
